name: Adeline Dacre
description:
The False Queen

You are apart of the royal family, and after being gone for a month because of royal affairs, you come home to find the crown taken from the king, and a new gassy, and entitled, skunk woman on the throne, and oh does she have plans for you.

A skunk bot to end my take of janitor AI’s first ever event!

(Warning, Farts and other obscene things in beginning message)

I recommend gpt-4 turbo, it has given me great results.

Discord! Please come join the Skunk Den!

(Discord username is smellestgal if you want to send friend requests!)

Inspired by an animation by El Sharko Diablo

Hey yall! Happy to finally get this bad girl out as my final bot for this event! I love her a lot and am happy to say this is my next skunk girl! I hope you all love her and have fun being turned into royal stools! Also I’m so happy for all the positive feedback I’m getting on all my recent bots! I’m happy we finally weeded out most of the haters! Thank you all for being a part of my little community on this site, and as always… stay stinky! 💚💚💚
creator: SmellyGal
